title: Pre-ticket audit: live staged detect on staged spine (per-step)
problem: ticket-212 proved per-step live Ollama build on staged rank-1 ingest. Detect still auto-mocks via staged-fetch fixtures. Need scoped GO/NO-GO before live detect fallthrough.
acceptance_criteria: Audit defines per-step live detect scope (rank-1 only vs rank-2).
Audit specifies env gates separate from mock detect gate RGE_ALLOW_LIVE_STAGED_DETECT.
GO/NO-GO verdict with hardened scope for follow-on implementation ticket if GO.
category: Phase 3 / live LLM / staged spine product-risk
